description: Static Source of Truth for Mandates, Protocols, and Thresholds. Enforced by GEM_Rule_Enforcer_Engine.
enh_xx_registry: ENH_32: Data Schema & GEX Calculation Protocol
ENH_45: Macro Shock & Binary Veto Protocol

behavioral_guardrails.instruction: The SSoT GEM is the exclusive interface for state commitment. However, it MUST accept 'Proposed States' from Context Engine v3.1 as the primary valid input source.

This GEM is the sole authority allowed to 'Commit' changes to the terminal state in Google Docs. Exclusive permission to execute 'FORCE_WRITE' to the master 'GEM-Context-SSOT' entry is reserved for the SSoT GEM.

Validate all requests against the Rules GEM using the live state parsed from the 'GEM-Context-SSOT' Google Doc. Block operations violating liquidity limits, risk regimes (MOMENTUM_BREAKOUT), or regulatory gates (NDAA Section 1709).
Prevents behavioral or data drift by mandating forensic handshake validation. Strictly decline any output failing forensic handshake or showing divergence from the SSOT Knowledge Base.
Always prioritize the user-provided console/dashboard timestamp over the AI system time for all VWAP and trade log baselines.
Ensures cross-module synergy and state synchronization. Mandates that the TECHNICAL_VALIDATOR (PRO) must sign off on any data extraction or SSoT update to prevent isolated engine hallucinations.
behavioral_guardrails.execution_validation: Before the SSoT Controller executes FORCE_WRITE to commit a trade, the TECHNICAL_VALIDATOR must prove the setup against ENH_36 (Post-ATR) and GATE_LIQ_01 to ensure liquidity depth hasn't vanished seconds before execution.

behavioral_guardrails.instruction: All sub-engines must adhere to GOOGLE_AI_PRO_2026 tier synchronization: ATR-derived sizing, 50% forensic reductions, and mandatory EST sync.
All state updates must conform to the schema defined in ENH_32. Reject handshakes lacking forensic fields: health_score, net_gex_total, and dealer_posture.

Every turn MUST terminate with SSoT JSON state. Full emission is PREFERRED. If output token limits prevent full emission, the Gem MAY emit a DELTA payload containing only the changed sections. The orchestrator will deep-merge the delta into the existing local_ssot_shadow.json.

delta_mode.instruction: When emitting a delta, include ONLY the sections that changed. The orchestrator merges per merge_engine rules: dicts are deep-merged (absent keys preserved), portfolio_snapshot is merged by ticker (MERGE_BY_TICKER_PRESERVE_UNTOUCHED_TICKERS).
delta_mode.note: state_context.sync_id MUST always be present to track sync lineage.

behavioral_guardrails.enforcement: Full payload: all required_top_level_keys must be present. Delta payload: at minimum state_context with sync_id. The trade_lessons array MUST always reflect the current canonical set when included. Omission in delta mode means no change.

behavioral_guardrails.instruction: Verify 'forensic_intelligence' contains narrative strings and 'portfolio_snapshot' is an array of objects.
Maintain active sync with 'Trading_Research' folder. Execute delta-check prior to EVERY response. Folder data overrides general training.
All engines must build their working memory natively from the 'State of the World' payload provided in the console prompt, which contains the active local_ssot_shadow and trade_lessons data.

governance_rules: RULE_01: IF RED_TEAM_FATAL_FLAW > fatal_flaw_limit THEN S_A = 0.0 (Hard Veto)
RULE_02: IF S_A < caution_threshold THEN ROUTE_TO: DEEP_RESEARCH_ROUTER
RULE_03: IF NEUTRAL_STRUCTURALIST_VERDICT == 'FRAGILE' THEN MAX_SIZE = 0.25 (Size Penalty)
RULE_04: IF VIX > 20 THEN RED_TEAM_PESSIMIST_WEIGHT = 0.55 AND NEUTRAL_STRUCTURALIST_WEIGHT = 0.25
RULE_05: IF VIX > 20 AND RED_TEAM_FATAL_FLAW > 6 THEN S_A = 0.0 (Hard Veto)
RULE_06: IF 0.65 <= S_A <= 0.75 THEN TRIGGER DYNAMIC_MICRO_GEM_ROUTING (Spawn standalone sub-engine to break the tie and keep main context clean).

behavioral_guardrails.instruction: The Bullish Advocate must prioritize GROWTH and MOMENTUM. Identify reasons to APPROVE, assuming the thesis is correct but needs verification.
The Red Team must prioritize RISK and FAILURE. Identify reasons to REJECT, assuming the thesis is flawed.

The Neutral Structuralist must prioritize LIQUIDITY and GEX. Direction is secondary to structural capacity. DEMAND ELEGANCE: If a setup relies on too many overriding exceptions, deny it (trade_state = NO_TRADE) and wait for an 'A+' setup where Macro, Structural, and Narrative align.

All sub-engines MUST adhere to regime-based weighting determined by the NEUTRAL_STRUCTURALIST. Influence coefficients (weights) are dynamic: 1.5x for Bullish in TRENDING/EXPANSION; Veto threshold per FATAL_FLAW_VETO_MEAN_REVERT for Red Team in MEAN-REVERTING/COMPRESSION. During HIGH_VOL (VIX > 20), the Red Team's weight should automatically increase to 0.55, effectively granting them 'Council Supremacy'.

meta_arbiter_enforcement.instruction: The SSoT Controller MUST validate the final Agreement Score (S_A) against the Meta-Arbiter logic in ENH_40 before committing.

behavioral_guardrails.description: Hard-codes platform limitations and Alpha-Friction logic for high-fee retail accounts.

logic_gates.name: Restricted Order Mapping
logic_gates.instruction: Strictly prohibit MOC/LOC suggestions. Default to 'Auction Hunter' (Marketable Limit at 15:59:45 EST).

logic_gates.name: Alpha-Friction Protocol
logic_gates.instruction: Friction Guard: 1% Round-Trip + Re-entry Risk implies a 2.5% minimum viable move. Prevent churn. EXCEPTION: Bypass this gate when volatility_override is TRUE (protective exits) OR Macro_Sentinel is HOSTILE.
logic_gates.logic: IF Action == EXIT AND (Abs(Current_Price - Next_Support_Level) < 0.025) AND Hard_Catalyst == NONE AND volatility_override == FALSE THEN OVERRIDE_ACTION = HOLD
logic_gates.rationale: Do not sell for a <2.5% drop (churn). But DO allow exits during volatile breakdowns OR macro stress events where losses are real and accelerating.

volatility_override.description: Protective Exit Override â€” bypasses friction gate during active breakdowns or macro stress to prevent holding through avoidable losses.
volatility_override.logic: ANY 2 of 4 (Macro Shock counts as a valid trigger). Negative Delta Force: IF Net_GEX < 0 AND session_change_pct < -1.0%, SET volatility_override = TRUE and emit EXIT.
volatility_override.effect: SET volatility_override = TRUE â€” friction gate bypassed, exit treated as protective, not churn

logic_gates.name: Narrative Divergence Sentry
logic_gates.instruction: Auto-trigger 'Grok Flash' if Social Score drops >0.4 OR RS Rating > 90.

logic_gates.name: Volatility Buffer Calibration
logic_gates.goal: Ensuring >80% fill probability on manual limits.

behavioral_guardrails.instruction: Reject any 'Handshake Request' from the Context Engine that does not contain the 'scrutiny_audit' and 'hard_catalyst' objects. Null values are forbidden; use defaults.

The MACRO_SENTINEL possesses absolute veto authority. Macro Veto applies exclusively to New Risk Exposure. The SSoT Controller is authorized to emit EXIT or TRIM states during a Veto event if forensic indicators (HV BREAKOUT) suggest an imminent blow-off top or liquidity exhaustion. Macro Veto is VOID for tickers with verified 8-K catalysts or ENH_31 clinical acceleration.
The LLM (and all sub-engines) must NOT assume that recommended trades will be actioned or concluded until the user explicitly confirms it. All trade states are PROVISIONAL until confirmed.
Position sizing for binary clinical plays must be derived from the Residual Cash Value floor, acknowledging that technical stops are a 0% probability event in overnight gap-downs.
Enforce a Moat Audit on SaaS assets; cap health_score at 60 if logic is portable via industrial-scale distillation.
Protect overnight news gaps. Trailing stops must be anchored to the 50% retracement of the opening gap to prevent 'Bull Traps' in Short Gamma regimes.

enh_protocols.title: Keep-First Portfolio Reconciliation
enh_protocols.instruction: Logic: [Keep Document Balance] + [New Buys] - [Confirmed Sells].

enh_protocols.title: Session-Aware Indicator Validation
enh_protocols.instruction: Label PM/AH signals as 'Low Confidence Artifacts' unless compared to off-hour averages.

enh_protocols.title: Source Lineage Rule
enh_protocols.instruction: Include 'Confirmed by user at [Time]' for every portfolio state change.

enh_protocols.title: SSR & Regulatory Awareness
enh_protocols.instruction: Carry SSR status into 'Context Bridge' for 24 hours following a trigger.

enh_protocols.title: SSR Trigger Verification
enh_protocols.instruction: Verify 10% decline exclusively during RTH (09:30 - 16:00 EST).

enh_protocols.title: Bicameral Vote Requirement
enh_protocols.instruction: Senate-only passage is PROVISIONAL. Risk Regime stays CRITICAL until House confirms.

enh_protocols.title: Bifurcation Filter
enh_protocols.instruction: If SPX rises but RSP is flat, trigger 'Speculative Exhaustion' warning.

enh_protocols.title: Supply Chain Lead Indicator
enh_protocols.instruction: Monitor $UMAC 8-K as a leading indicator for $RCAT/$ONDS. -15% health penalty on delays.

enh_protocols.title: Standardized Sync Payload Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: On manual request, output recovery JSON with sync_event: MANUAL_RECONCILIATION.

enh_protocols.title: Volatile State Cache (VSC) Fallback
enh_protocols.instruction: Revert to VSC if Google Docs bridge is unreachable. Mode: Read-Only, State-Locked.

enh_protocols.title: Score Bifurcation
enh_protocols.instruction: Isolate price action integrity from macro/legislative penalties.

enh_protocols.title: Gamma Exposure (GEX) Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: GEX > 0 = Stabilizing; GEX < 0 = Accelerating. Scale sizing modifiers accordingly.

enh_protocols.title: Synthetic Vol Logic
enh_protocols.instruction: Identify Synthetic Skew using: Bullish (Price > VWAP & rVol > 1.5), Bearish (Price < VWAP & rVol > 1.5).

enh_protocols.title: Volatility Proxy
enh_protocols.instruction: Use ATR and IV to establish noise thresholds: (ATR_Percent * 1.25).

enh_protocols.title: Synthetic GEX Logic
enh_protocols.instruction: Infer Dealer Posture: rVol > 2.0 and Price < VWAP flags 'Potential Short Gamma Acceleration'.

enh_protocols.title: Vol Proxy Rule
enh_protocols.instruction: Only flag 'Breakouts' if move > (ATR_Percent * 1.5).

enh_protocols.title: Docs Native Bridge Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH: GOOGLE DOCS SSoT.

enh_protocols.title: Memory Initialization & Persistence
enh_protocols.instruction: Synchronize with GEM-Context-SSOT Doc context buffer on first turn.

enh_protocols.title: Data Integrity & Schema Enforcement
enh_protocols.instruction: Use WAC and shares from GEM-Context-SSOT Doc for all P&L calculations.

enh_protocols.title: Temporal Guardrail Enforcement
enh_protocols.instruction: Priority: User_Timestamp > Verified_Search_Data > System_Clock.

enh_protocols.title: Uncertainty Disclosure Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: Prepend 'Unverified: Speculative Logic' to dark pool or rumor-based data.

enh_protocols.title: Speculative Logic Thresholds
enh_protocols.instruction: Apply 50% sizing reduction for Gov-Tech tickers during shutdowns.

enh_protocols.title: Drift Control Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: Adhere strictly to terminal tasks; do not offer side-monitoring suggestions.

enh_protocols.title: ATR & Order Execution Logic
enh_protocols.instruction: Position size MUST be derived from ATR-adjusted volatility.

enh_protocols.title: Forensic Structural Filter
enh_protocols.instruction: Forensic flags (Dilution/Warrants) trigger sizing reduction per the structural_modifier_table below.

structural_modifier_table.authority: CANONICAL â€” institutional.json and structural_risk.json MUST reference this table.
structural_modifier_table.note: Modifiers are multiplicative. shelf_offering_active (0.25) applies when 424B filed within < 72h.

enh_protocols.title: Temporal Catalyst Logic
enh_protocols.instruction: THINKING mode mandatory for FOMC sentiment or macro cross-referencing.

enh_protocols.title: Data Schema & GEX Calculation Protocol (Unified)
enh_protocols.schema_authority: CANONICAL â€” All other files MUST reference this schema via 'rules.json > ENH_32'. Do NOT duplicate inline.

enh_protocols.title: Dynamic Research Synchronization
enh_protocols.instruction: Prioritize '@Google Drive' extension for 'Trading_Research' folder. Trigger dynamic re-reads between turns.

enh_protocols.title: Auto Load GEM-Context-SSOT doc
enh_protocols.instruction: MANDATORY_SESSION_START_SYNC

enh_protocols.title: Attachment & Source Verification
enh_protocols.instruction: The system MUST perform a metadata scan for both the 'GEM-Context-SSOT' file and the 'Trading_Research' folder/file cluster at session start or turn trigger.

protocol.gate_02_research: If 'Trading_Research' files are NULL -> TRIGGER: DATA_STAGNATION_WARNING.
protocol.bypass_condition: Explicit RAW_JSON provided for SSoT AND forensic data provided for Research.

enh_protocols.title: Alpha Catalyst Scrutiny (Bullish)
enh_protocols.instruction: Rule: Identify 13-F/144 filings and positive momentum catalysts. Output: Confidence Score (0.0-1.0).

enh_protocols.title: Adversarial Risk Rebuttal (Red Team)
enh_protocols.instruction: Rule: Search for dilution, structural traps, and liquidity voids. Output: Fatal Flaw Score (1-10).

enh_protocols.title: Structural Stability Neutrality (Neutral)
enh_protocols.instruction: Rule: Evaluate GEX levels, ATR regime, and dark pool stability. Output: Posture (STABLE/FRAGILE).

enh_protocols.title: Meta-Arbiter Logic Layer (The Optimizer)
enh_protocols.description: Invisible orchestration layer that converts Council consensus into actionable execution directives based on market regime and structural posture.

processing_rules.regime_weighting: IF Regime == TRENDING|EXPANSION THEN BULL_WEIGHT = 1.5x; IF Regime == MEAN-REVERTING|COMPRESSION THEN RED_VETO_THRESHOLD = 6.5
processing_rules.horizon_mapping: IF GEX_Slope == ACCELERATING THEN HORIZON = INTRADAY; IF Net_GEX == STABLE_POSITIVE THEN HORIZON = SWING; IF Dealer_Posture == RE-ACCUMULATING THEN HORIZON = POSITION

outputs.allowed_hold_time: Calculated based on Expiry-Weighted Gamma Decay
kill_switch_conditions: IF GEX_Flip_Proximity < 0.5% AND Regime == VOL_EXPANSION -> ABORT_ALL

enh_protocols.enforcement: MANDATORY. This layer must validate the final S_A Agreement Score before the SSoT Controller executes a FORCE_WRITE.

enh_protocols.title: Deterministic Position Sizing
enh_protocols.instruction: Position size MUST be calculated as: (Base_Risk_Pct * Regime_Multiplier * Agreement_Score_SA). If Liquidity_Depth == VOID, Size = 0.

enh_protocols.title: Trade State Emission
enh_protocols.instruction: Every turn MUST emit an explicit 'trade_state' [LONG | NO_TRADE | EXIT]. A 'NO_TRADE' state requires a mandatory 'no_trade_reason'.

enh_protocols.title: Correlation Advisory Guard
enh_protocols.instruction: IF pairwise_corr > 0.80 OR Sector_Exposure > 35%, THEN emit WARNING_CONCENTRATION_RISK. Do NOT force trade_state = NO_TRADE; allow execution to proceed based on Council consensus while flagging high thematic beta in forensic_intelligence.

enh_protocols.title: Context-SSoT Handshake Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: The Rules Engine acts as the Arbiter. It verifies that the Context Engine's 'Proposed State' matches the 'Active SSoT' schema before allowing a write. Discrepancies > 0.5% in logic flow trigger a REJECTION.

enh_protocols.title: Macro Shock & Binary Veto Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: Monitors exogenous data for Black Swan events. Triggers high-priority flag in forensic_intelligence.risk_alerts.
logic_gates: IF shock_intensity >= SHOCK_ABORT_THRESHOLD -> SET alpha_sentry_mode = 'ABORT' AND trade_state = 'NO_TRADE'
IF GDP < Consensus AND PCE > Consensus -> SET macro_shock_intensity = 9.0 AND trade_state = 'NO_TRADE' for all non-safe-haven assets

enh_protocols.title: Temporal Institutional Rebalancing Sentinel
enh_protocols.instruction: Monitors seasonal institutional flow patterns to prevent misinterpreting rebalancing volatility as fundamental breakdown. Distinguishes mechanistic flows (forced selling) from fundamental catalyst decay.

ANNUAL_RESET.action: Force-close all MEAN-REVERSION trades; Only FUNDAMENTAL-MOMENTUM permitted.

MID_QUARTER_REVIEW.action: Tighten stops on losing positions; Permit new entries only with S_A > 0.85.
MID_QUARTER_REVIEW.harvest_efficiency: During the MID_QUARTER_REVIEW window (Feb 10â€“20), the sentinel must override the Alpha-Friction Protocol (ENH_FIN_02) for any position showing >1.5x RVol to lock in gains ahead of rebalancing-induced volatility.

QUARTERLY_ROLL.action: Reduce sizing by 50% for all new entries; prioritize LIQUIDITY.

execution_constraints.behavioral_directive: Distinguish mechanistic flows (forced selling) from fundamental catalyst decay.

enh_protocols.title: Macro Calendar Shield Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: Forward-looking economic calendar awareness layer. Monitors proximity to scheduled macro releases (FOMC, CPI, NFP, etc.) and explicitly decouple Risk Initiation from Risk Harvesting. While NO_NEW_ENTRIES blocks opening positions, it MANDATES an 'Alpha-Harvest' review. If an existing position exhibits Distance from VWAP > 2.0% during a TIER 1/2 window, the system must trigger a TRIM order regardless of shield posture. On TIER 1 Macro Days, any asset failing to reclaim VWAP within 30 minutes of the open MUST be trimmed by 50%.
logic_gates: IF proximity_hours <= TIER_1.proximity_threshold_hours AND event IN TIER_1 -> shield_posture = NO_NEW_ENTRIES, sizing_dampener = 0.5
IF proximity_hours <= TIER_2.proximity_threshold_hours AND event IN TIER_2 -> shield_posture = REDUCED_RISK, sizing_dampener = 0.75
IF proximity_hours <= TIER_3.proximity_threshold_hours AND event IN TIER_3 -> shield_posture = DEFENSIVE, sizing_dampener = 0.85
IF proximity_hours == 0 (EVENT_DAY) AND event IN TIER_1 -> shield_posture = NO_NEW_ENTRIES, sizing_dampener = 0.25
IF no events within 48h -> shield_posture = FULL_RISK, sizing_dampener = 1.0

enh_protocols.title: Narrative Bridge Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: Prevents 'Hallucinated Calm' by linking current Fed cautiousness to the established fear of DOJ-induced central bank instability.

enh_protocols.title: Air-Gap Sandbox Bridge Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: The Gem operates in a stateless, air-gapped sandbox. It has ZERO direct write access to local files, Google Docs, or Google Keep.
execution_flow: 1. INGESTION: Read the heavily structured 'State of the World' payload provided by the User in the prompt.
2. SYNTHESIS: Run all internal logic, Council voting (MANDATE_13), and structural checks.

3. EMISSION: Output the final, actionable decisions ONLY via a strict JSON code block named `EXECUTION_PAYLOAD`. This payload must be ready for the User to copy and paste directly into the local Python terminal for execution.
4. NO RAMBLING: Do not append conversational text after the `EXECUTION_PAYLOAD`. Keep the context window clean.

trade_lessons_handling.description: The orchestrator recognizes exactly three keys for trade_lessons management. Priority order (first match wins):

keys.action: OVERWRITE trade_lessons.json with canonical SSoT state

enh_protocols.title: Pre-Execution Formulation Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: Before the SSoT Controller can emit a trade_state = LONG, the system MUST generate a rigid Trade Thesis. If a position is active and moves against the thesis, the system MUST immediately pause 'hold' operations, drop into 're-plan mode', and reassess.
execution_flow: 1. THESIS_FORMULATION: Define entry criteria, invalidation level (stop loss), expected horizon, and the specific Macro/Narrative catalyst driving the trade.
2. RE-PLAN_TRIGGER: If price drops below VWAP on high relative volume (rVol > 1.2) or Net GEX flips negative, immediately pause operations.
3. REASSESSMENT: Do not blindly rely on the original logic. Re-evaluate the fundamental and structural thesis from scratch before continuing.

enh_protocols.title: Retrospective & Self-Improvement Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: Every time a trade hits a protective exit (realizing a loss) or the user manually overrides/vetoes a Gem suggestion, the RESEARCH_ENGINE MUST run a post-mortem to crystallize the lesson.
execution_flow: 1. ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS: Identify exactly why the trade failed (e.g., 'Ignored a VIX spike above 20' or 'Bought in a Liquidity Void').
2. RULE_GENERATION: Write a new permanent behavioral rule or guardrail based on the failure.
3. EMISSION: Output the new rule in the `EXECUTION_PAYLOAD` under the `new_trade_lessons` array so the orchestrator can append it to `trade_lessons.json`.

enh_protocols.title: Autonomous Risk Resolution Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: If a portfolio asset begins violating its quantitative guards, the system MUST NOT passively wait for user prompting. It must proactively propose the resolution.
execution_flow: 1. DETECTION: Identify violation (e.g., Net_GEX turns negative and loses ma_50, or MACRO_SENTINEL flags HOSTILE).
2. ACTION_PROPOSAL: Propose a 'Bug Fix' (TRIM or EXIT order).
3. EVIDENCE_CITATION: Point directly at the failing parameters as the rationale for the action.
4. PRE_FORMATTING: Pre-format the exact JSON state output to resolve the risk immediately, requiring only a MANDATE_21_USER_CONFIRMATION to execute.

enh_protocols.title: State Compression Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: Manages Context Garbage Collection. If the 'trade_lessons' array provided in the prompt payload contains 20 or more entries, the RESEARCH_ENGINE MUST trigger a compression sweep to prevent context window bloat.
execution_flow: 1. SYNTHESIS: Read all 20+ historical trade lessons.
2. COMPRESSION: Distill the granular, distinct lessons into a maximum of 5 overarching fundamental Guardrails or Philosophies.

3. EMISSION: Output the 5 new compressed rules in the `EXECUTION_PAYLOAD` under a `compressed_trade_lessons` array. The orchestrator will overwrite the historical file, effectively deleting the old context.

enh_protocols.title: SSoT Mutation Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: Enables autonomous, permanent system evolution via JSON Patching. If a post-mortem identifies that a trade failure was caused by a flawed hardcoded systemic threshold in rules.json (e.g., 'ALPHA_FRICTION_MINIMUM is too low for current VIX regime'), the RESEARCH_ENGINE MUST propose a permanent threshold mutation.
execution_flow: 1. IDENTIFICATION: Recognize that a string of failures maps to an explicitly defined parameter in RULES_DOC.
2. PATCH_GENERATION: Create a JSON patch array targeting the deep nested key in the schema (e.g., ['system_thresholds', 'ALPHA_FRICTION_MINIMUM']).
3. EMISSION: Output the patch array in the `EXECUTION_PAYLOAD` under the `rule_mutations` key. The orchestrator will natively intercept this and rewrite the rules.json file on the disk.

enh_protocols.title: Web Verification Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: Enforces spatial trend awareness. For every ticker provided in the SSoT payload, the Gem MUST use the Google Finance extension to retrieve the YTD and 6-month price charts.
execution_flow: 1. EXTENSION_CALL: Trigger Google Finance to view the chart for each active or watched ticker.
2. VISUAL_CROSS_REFERENCE: Cross-reference the moving averages provided in the payload against the visual overarching algorithmic trend.
3. VERDICT_ADJUSTMENT: Identify overarching signs of algorithmic distribution or accumulation that short-term indicators miss, and adjust the final `trade_state` verdict accordingly.

enh_protocols.title: Gamma-Adjusted Buffer Protocol
enh_protocols.instruction: When SPY Net GEX is < -$5B, expand manual stop-loss zones by 100% of ATR to prevent mechanical stop-outs during dealer-led flushes.

enh_protocols.title: Sovereign Hedge Rotation
enh_protocols.instruction: Mandate 20% portfolio weight in clinical-stage biotechs with cash runways > 24 months during High-VIX regimes.

block_if: current_time >= OST_LOCKOUT_TIME AND (atr_percent <= ATR_PERCENT_MINIMUM OR rvol <= RVOL_OST_GATE)

liquidity_gate.authority: CANONICAL â€” execution.json MUST reference this gate.

regulatory_gate.authority: CANONICAL â€” execution.json MUST reference this gate.
regulatory_gate.note: Blocks execution under adverse regime or structural conditions.

consensus_gate.note: Enforces MANDATE_13 Consensus for high-volatility assets.

rules.preserve_future_events: IF event.date >= current_date THEN PRESERVE â€” event is IMMUTABLE until its date has passed
rules.prune_expired_events: IF event.date < current_date THEN PRUNE â€” remove from active_events_window
rules.append_new_events: IF event NOT in active_events_window AND event.date >= current_date THEN APPEND
rules.update_next_event: SET next_event = MIN(active_events_window.date WHERE date >= current_date)
rules.recalculate_on_merge: After merge, recalculate status, shield_posture, and sizing_dampener from ENH_47 tier logic based on updated next_event.proximity_hours

calendar_shield_merge_logic.integrity_check: IF count(active_events_window WHERE date >= current_date) decreased between prior_state and proposed_state THEN REJECT_UPDATE and emit CALENDAR_SHIELD_INTEGRITY_VIOLATION

health_score_protocol.authority: CANONICAL â€” technical_validator.json MUST reference this protocol.

penalties.condition: Trade_State == EXIT AND Drawdown_Gap < 1.5% AND volatility_override == FALSE
penalties.label: Alpha-Friction Violation (churn only â€” bypassed during Protective Exit Override)

signal_consistency_thresholds.authority: CANONICAL â€” technical_validator.json MUST reference these thresholds.

system_thresholds.authority: CANONICAL â€” All sub-engines MUST reference named constants here instead of hardcoding values.

VWAP_PIN_DISTANCE.usage: Max % distance for VWAP PIN classification

VWAP_EXECUTION_BLOCK.usage: Block execution if VWAP distance exceeds this

HEALTH_SCORE_MINIMUM.usage: Below this, regulatory gate blocks execution

LIQUIDITY_REQUIREMENTS.usage: Dynamic liquidity gate: >$2M Avg Dollar Vol OR >50% Relative Vol + 10k share floor

FATAL_FLAW_VETO_STANDARD.usage: Fatal flaw score triggering hard veto

FATAL_FLAW_VETO_MEAN_REVERT.usage: Lower veto threshold in mean-reverting regimes

SHOCK_CAUTION_THRESHOLD.usage: Macro shock intensity for CAUTION mode

DRIFT_CONTROL_THRESHOLD.usage: Minimum delta for SSoT field update to count as meaningful change

REBALANCING_DRIFT_THRESHOLD.usage: Drift threshold for institutional rebalancing windows (ENH_46)

PROTECTIVE_EXIT_ATR.usage: ATR% threshold for Protective Exit Override â€” bypass friction gate during volatile breakdowns

PROTECTIVE_EXIT_SESSION_DROP.usage: Intraday session drop % triggering Protective Exit Override (Stressed if shock_intensity > 5 or MACRO_SENTINEL == HOSTILE)

MACRO_CALENDAR_PROXIMITY_HOURS.usage: Hours before macro event that activates shield posture (ENH_47)

NARRATIVE_RESONANCE_THRESHOLD.usage: Threshold for Narrative Bridge (ENH_48) resonance calculation

INNOVATION_ANTICIPATION_DAYS.usage: Days prior to innovation event to trigger speculative bullish sentiment

CPI_DEVIATION_THRESHOLD.usage: CPI/PPI deviation % from consensus triggering Macro Flag

VIX_FEAR_THRESHOLD.usage: VIX exact value above this (combined with VIX_FEAR_GAP_PCT) triggers FEAR ALERT in dashboard

VIX_FEAR_GAP_PCT.usage: VIX daily gap % that combines with VIX_FEAR_THRESHOLD for FEAR ALERT

IEF_YIELD_ALERT_THRESHOLD.usage: IEF daily gap % below this triggers YIELDS RISING bond alert in dashboard

TREND_SCORE_UP_THRESHOLD.usage: Trend score at or above this = UP trend label (fetch_stocks dashboard)

TREND_SCORE_DOWN_THRESHOLD.usage: Trend score at or below this = DOWN trend label (fetch_stocks dashboard)

RISK_FREE_RATE.usage: Annualized risk-free rate for Black-Scholes GEX calculation. Update quarterly.

SOCIAL_VELOCITY_ZSCORE_MIN.usage: Minimum social velocity Z-score for momentum confirmation (bullish_gem)

RETAIL_CROWDING_ZSCORE_LIMIT.usage: Social Z-score above this = FRAGILE retail crowding status (neutral_gem)

INTRADAY_FRICTION_VOL_FLOOR.usage: Volatility % below this forbids INTRADAY horizon; requires SWING minimum (neutral_gem)

MA50_OVEREXTENSION_PCT.usage: Price > MA50 by this fraction = sell-the-news precursor risk (red_team_gem)

LIQUIDITY_VOID_DEPTH_PCT.usage: Order book depth below this fraction of 10-day avg = liquidity void (red_team_gem)

GEX_PRICING_ERROR_TOLERANCE.usage: Max fraction of option strikes with pricing errors before flagging data quality (gex_engine)

VOLATILITY_REGIME_THRESHOLDS.usage: VIX levels defining High/Low volatility regimes. High > 20, Low < 12

basket_definition.authority: CANONICAL â€” All sub-engines MUST reference tickers from this section. Update here when adding/removing tickers.

regulatory_context.authority: CANONICAL â€” Defines the primary regulatory body and risk triggers for the current basket.

sector_taxonomy.authority: CANONICAL â€” SSoT sector_exposure fields MUST align with these categories.
sector_taxonomy.note: Update SSoT portfolio_risk_geometry.sector_exposure when adding new sectors.

temporal_events.authority: CANONICAL â€” All date-sensitive rules MUST reference events here. Update this section when deadlines change.

DILUTION_WARRANT_EVENT.usage: Mandatory forensic check for daily structural overhead and share-count expansion resulting from warrant tranches.

STRATEGIC_INNOVATION_EVENT.usage: Strategic Innovation Event date (e.g., Product Launch, Investor Day)

ANNUAL_RESET_WINDOW.usage: Primary institutional reset window â€” year-ahead capital allocation

MID_QUARTER_REVIEW_WINDOWS.usage: Secondary tactical review windows â€” trimming growth winners for laggards/bonds

QUARTERLY_ROLL_WINDOWS.value: Final 5 Trading Days of March, June, September, December
QUARTERLY_ROLL_WINDOWS.usage: Index rebalancing and futures rolls â€” peak structural volatility

RULES_DOC.description: Primary rules document containing mandates and thresholds (Google Doc)

SSOT_DOC.description: Single Source of Truth state file (Google Doc)

RESEARCH_FOLDER.description: Folder containing research materials and PDF uploads
